metadata.description: Xenodot Twin — agents, skills, tools and hooks for AI-assisted digital-twin viewers on Godot. Ships one plugin: the xenodot base (engine-generic Godot work) with the digital-twin domain folded in.

plugins.name: xenodot
plugins.description: Builder/researcher agents, godot-* engine skills (verify, code-rules, export-builds, import) and the digital-twin domain — the twin-architect / scene-optimizer / data-binder agents and twin-import / twin-optimize / twin-bind-data / twin-verify / twin-playback skills for building IFC/BIM → Godot viewers with live data — plus verification tools and safety hooks for Godot / Redot / Blazium work with Claude Code. One plugin, xenodot: namespace.
